nodes.name: Left turn to elevator
nodes.instruction: Turn left. Keep going straight towards elevator.

nodes.name: Elevator left
nodes.instruction: Elevator on your left. Go to second floor.

nodes.name: Exit elevator left
nodes.instruction: Exit the elevator and turn left towards Freshsub.

nodes.name: Right turn to pedway
nodes.instruction: Turn right and keep walking straight towards the pedway.

nodes.name: Automatic door 1
nodes.instruction: Automatic door ahead. You may continue.

nodes.name: Automatic door 2
nodes.instruction: Automatic door ahead. You may continue.

nodes.name: Arrived NREF
nodes.instruction: You have arrived NREF, have a nice one.
